headline: Ventas Chairman and CEO Debra A. Cafaro to Receive Cyrus McCormick Making History Award for Historic Corporate Achievement
summary: CHICAGO, June 03, 2026--Ventas, Inc. (NYSE: VTR) today announced that Chairman and Chief Executive Officer Debra A. Cafaro will receive the Cyrus McCormick Making History Award for Historic Corporate Achievement at the Chicago History Museum’s 32nd Annual Making History Awards this evening.
